name: Poly Resonator
description: This algorithm is a polysynth where each voice is essentially a Rings (the open source Rings module by Émilie Gillet). Rings itself does support a kind of polyphony, but it’s limited by having a single pitch and gate input - it’s very much designed so that only one note is triggered at a time. This algorithm gives you a full Rings implementation for each voice, with the convenience of shared parameter control.
gui_description: The display shows the notes being played by the various voices. Note that Rings voices never really end – in theory they decay forever.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Selects the resonator mode.

parameters.name: Synth effect
parameters.description: If the mode is 'Synth', selects the audio effect applied to the synth output.

parameters.name: Coarse tune
parameters.description: Provides a coarse tuning control.

parameters.name: Fine tune
parameters.description: Provides a fine tuning control.

parameters.name: Resolution
parameters.description: Sets the resolution of the resonators. This controls the number of resonator building blocks that contribute to the overall sound and affects CPU load.

parameters.name: Structure
parameters.description: Controls the resonator 'structure'.

parameters.name: Brightness
parameters.description: Controls the resonator 'brightness'.

parameters.name: Damping
parameters.description: Controls the resonator 'damping'.

parameters.name: Position
parameters.description: Controls the resonator 'position'.

parameters.name: Chord
parameters.description: Chooses the chord to use for resonator modes that use one. In the original, set from the Structure knob.

parameters.name: Noise gate
parameters.description: Enables a noise gate on the audio input. Always enabled in the original Rings.

parameters.name: Input gain
parameters.description: A gain applied to the input audio, before it hits the resonator.

parameters.name: Odd output mode
parameters.description: The Add/Replace mode for the Odd output.

parameters.name: Even output mode
parameters.description: The Add/Replace mode for the Even output.

parameters.name: Output gain
parameters.description: The output level (of both the Odd and Even outputs).

parameters.name: Dry gain
parameters.description: The level of the input audio mixed into the output(s).

parameters.name: MIDI channel
parameters.description: The MIDI channel to listen on.

parameters.name: MPE channels
parameters.description: Controls how the algorithm will respond to MPE.

parameters.name: I2C channel
parameters.description: Sets the I2C channel.

parameters.name: Bend range
parameters.description: The MIDI pitch bend range.

parameters.name: Sustain mode
parameters.description: The standard polysynth sustain mode parameter.

parameters.name: Sustain
parameters.description: Directly controls the sustain (like a MIDI sustain pedal).

parameters.name: Press -> volume
parameters.description: The amount by which pressure (per note for MPE) affects the note volume.

parameters.name: Press -> structure
parameters.description: The amount by which pressure (per note for MPE) affects the structure.

parameters.name: Press -> brightness
parameters.description: The amount by which pressure (per note for MPE) affects the brightness.

parameters.name: Press -> damping
parameters.description: The amount by which pressure (per note for MPE) affects the damping.

parameters.name: Press -> position
parameters.description: The amount by which pressure (per note for MPE) affects the position.

parameters.name: MPE Y -> volume
parameters.description: The amount by which the MPE Y dimension affects the note volume.

parameters.name: MPE Y -> structure
parameters.description: The amount by which the MPE Y dimension affects the structure.

parameters.name: MPE Y -> brightness
parameters.description: The amount by which the MPE Y dimension affects the brightness.

parameters.name: MPE Y -> damping
parameters.description: The amount by which the MPE Y dimension affects the damping.

parameters.name: MPE Y -> position
parameters.description: The amount by which the MPE Y dimension affects the position.

input_ports.name: Audio input
input_ports.description: Audio signal input for the resonator.

input_ports.name: Audio input
input_ports.description: Chooses which input bus to use for the audio input.

output_ports.name: Odd output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the Odd output.

output_ports.name: Even output
output_ports.description: The bus to use for the Even output.
